'''鈭歯g-l-j''' ('''kangalaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaddle|quaddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaddle|quaddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-l-j
|-
! Lemma
| kangalaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingalaj|thingalaj]] || [[word:jingalaj|jingalaj]] || [[word:shingalaj|shingalaj]] || [[word:kingalaj|kingalaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungalaj|thuthungalaj]] || [[word:jujungalaj|jujungalaj]] || [[word:shushungalaj|shushungalaj]] || [[word:kukungalaj|kukungalaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungalaj|thungalaj]] || [[word:jungalaj|jungalaj]] || [[word:shungalaj|shungalaj]] || [[word:kungalaj|kungalaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungalaj|thungalaj]] || [[word:jungalaj|jungalaj]] || [[word:shungalaj|shungalaj]] || [[word:kungalaj|kungalaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengalaj|thengalaj]] || [[word:jengalaj|jengalaj]] || [[word:shengalaj|shengalaj]] || [[word:kengalaj|kengalaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongalaj|thothongalaj]] || [[word:jojongalaj|jojongalaj]] || [[word:shoshongalaj|shoshongalaj]] || [[word:kokongalaj|kokongalaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongalaj|thongalaj]] || [[word:jongalaj|jongalaj]] || [[word:shongalaj|shongalaj]] || [[word:kongalaj|kongalaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongalaj|thongalaj]] || [[word:jongalaj|jongalaj]] || [[word:shongalaj|shongalaj]] || [[word:kongalaj|kongalaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngalaj|th忙ngalaj]] || [[word:j忙ngalaj|j忙ngalaj]] || [[word:sh忙ngalaj|sh忙ngalaj]] || [[word:k忙ngalaj|k忙ngalaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangalaj|thathangalaj]] || [[word:jajangalaj|jajangalaj]] || [[word:shashangalaj|shashangalaj]] || [[word:kakangalaj|kakangalaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangalaj|thangalaj]] || [[word:jangalaj|jangalaj]] || [[word:shangalaj|shangalaj]] || [[word:kangalaj|kangalaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangalaj|thangalaj]] || [[word:jangalaj|jangalaj]] || [[word:shangalaj|shangalaj]] || [[word:kangalaj|kangalaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangalaj|shangalaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangalaj|goshangalaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangalaj|gokishangalaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangalajn眉|shangalajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangalajnkn眉|goshangalajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalajn眉|gokishangalajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangalajsh毛|shangalajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangalajnksh毛|goshangalajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangalajsh毛|gokishangalajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalajro|shangalajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalajnkro|goshangalajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalajro|gokishangalajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalajmu|shangalajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalajnkmu|goshangalajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalajmu|gokishangalajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangalajsher|shangalajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangalajnksher|goshangalajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangalajsher|gokishangalajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangalajng|shangalajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangalajnkng|goshangalajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangalajng|gokishangalajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangalajya|shangalajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangalajnkya|goshangalajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangalajya|gokishangalajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangalajyam|shangalajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangalajnkyam|goshangalajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangalajyam|gokishangalajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangalajn眉sh毛|shangalajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangalajnkn眉sh毛|goshangalajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangalajn眉sh毛|gokishangalajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalajn眉ro|shangalajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalajnkn眉ro|goshangalajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalajn眉ro|gokishangalajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalajn眉mu|shangalajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalajnkn眉mu|goshangalajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalajn眉mu|gokishangalajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangalajsh毛n眉|shangalajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangalajnksh毛n眉|goshangalajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalajsh毛n眉|gokishangalajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalajsh毛ro|shangalajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalajnksh毛ro|goshangalajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalajsh毛ro|gokishangalajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalajsh毛mu|shangalajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalajnksh毛mu|goshangalajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalajsh毛mu|gokishangalajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangalajron眉|shangalajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangalajnkron眉|goshangalajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalajron眉|gokishangalajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangalajrosh毛|shangalajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangalajnkrosh毛|goshangalajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangalajrosh毛|gokishangalajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangalajromu|shangalajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangalajnkromu|goshangalajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangalajromu|gokishangalajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangalajmun眉|shangalajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangalajnkmun眉|goshangalajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangalajmun眉|gokishangalajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangalajmush毛|shangalajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangalajnkmush毛|goshangalajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangalajmush毛|gokishangalajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangalajmuro|shangalajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangalajnkmuro|goshangalajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangalajmuro|gokishangalajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
